subject: english
title: Unit 8 Reading App — Hide and Seek
subtitle: Landing screen → Student Book (vocab flashcards + reading + activities) · Workbook coming in Block 2.

content: Read the geocaching passage paragraph by paragraph, with each paragraph unlocked by answering its comprehension question.
Practice the Identify Sequence of Events strategy with 7 signal words and 5 tap-the-signal-word sentences.
Put the 5 cache-discovery steps in the correct order (LP Activity 2).
Label 7 geocaching items by photo and identify which 4 items help you find the cache (LP Activity 3).
Score at least 80% on the 10-question reading quiz.
language: Recognize signal words: first, next, before, after, then, finally, last.
Use the academic word sequence in context.
Read the 9 content words in context: outdoor, hiders, seekers, treasure, app, clues, compass, ornament, sinking.
